assignments.name: transcript
assignments.value: =Hello this is Ben from Ben's Electric. We handle sprinkler systems and fire alarm inspections. Emergency calls like sprinkler leaks should go to dispatch.

assignments.name: onboarding_transcript
assignments.value: Hi, this is Ben from Ben's Electric again. We want the AI agent to send non-emergency calls to voicemail after 6pm. Emergency calls should still go directly to dispatch. Also our office address is 450 Market Street.
